response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, significant scale experience, and technical leadership across multiple organizations, they lack the domain-specific expertise critical for this Principal-level role. There is no evidence of experience building experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, feature-flagging systems, or statistical analysis—all core to growth engineering. For an IC6 position focused specifically on experimentation and measurement systems, this gap is disqualifying.
strengths: 15+ years of production engineering across multiple languages and platforms, with demonstrated scale experience (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Proven technical leadership through multiple staff/senior roles with architectural responsibility and cross-team influence
Recent exposure to AI tools and infrastructure at re:cinq, showing engagement with modern technical landscapes
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems—core deliverables for this role
Missing background in metrics, telemetry, instrumentation, and data analysis fundamentals essential to growth engineering
Generalist full-stack profile (web, mobile, desktop, embedded) rather than deep specialization in growth/experimentation domain

key_factors.factor: Software engineering fundamentals and scale experience
